info.title: Flapjack Cloud API
info.description: Cloud infrastructure and billing platform API

delete.description:
**Auth:** JWT (`AuthenticatedTenant`).
Requires the customer's current password as confirmation. Sets the
customer status to "deleted" (soft delete — row retained for audit).
Returns 204 on success.

patch.summary: `PATCH /account` — update the authenticated customer's display name.
patch.description:
**Auth:** JWT (`AuthenticatedTenant`).
Trims and validates the name length, then persists the change.
Returns the full `CustomerProfileResponse`.

post.summary: `POST /account/change-password` — rotate the authenticated customer's password.
post.description:
**Auth:** JWT (`AuthenticatedTenant`).
Verifies `current_password` against the stored bcrypt hash before accepting
the new password. Returns 204 on success, 400 if the current password is
incorrect or the new password fails validation.

get.summary: `GET /api-keys` — list all API keys for the authenticated customer.
get.description:
**Auth:** JWT (`AuthenticatedTenant`).
Returns key metadata (id, name, prefix, scopes, timestamps) but never
the full key — that is only available at creation time.

post.summary: `POST /api-keys` — generate a new API key for the authenticated customer.
post.description:
**Auth:** JWT (`AuthenticatedTenant`).
Validates the name and scopes, generates a `fjc_live_`-prefixed random
key, stores its SHA-256 hash (never the plaintext), and returns the full
key **exactly once** in `CreateApiKeyResponse.key`. Subsequent listings
only expose the 16-character prefix.

delete.description:
**Auth:** JWT (`AuthenticatedTenant`).
Verifies the key belongs to the authenticated customer before revoking.
Returns 204 on success, 404 if the key does not exist or belongs to
another customer (no ownership leak).

post.summary: `POST /auth/forgot-password` — request a password-reset email (no auth required).
post.description:
Returns 200 for unknown/deleted accounts and for delivery failures to avoid
leaking account existence. For active accounts, stores a 1-hour reset token
and attempts email delivery with route-layer retry.

200.description: Reset email sent if account exists

post.summary: `POST /auth/login` — authenticate with email and password (no auth required).
post.description:
Looks up the customer by email (case-insensitive), rejects deleted accounts,
and verifies the password against the stored bcrypt hash. Returns a 24-hour
JWT in `AuthResponse`, or 400 with a generic "invalid email or password"
message for any credential mismatch (avoids leaking which field was wrong).

Retry-After.description: Seconds remaining before login can be retried

post.summary: Create a customer account and send the initial email verification message.

503.description: Email service unavailable

post.summary: Reissue a password-reset email when the previous reset link is missing or expired.

200.description: Reset email sent if account exists

post.summary: `POST /auth/resend-verification` — re-send the email verification link.
post.description:
**Auth:** JWT (`AuthenticatedTenant`).
Reserves a fresh 24-hour verification token and 60-second cooldown through
the repo-owned seam, then dispatches via the email service. If delivery
fails, it restores the previous token/cooldown state so customers can retry
immediately once email delivery recovers.

Retry-After.description: Seconds remaining before another resend attempt is allowed

503.description: Email service unavailable

post.summary:
`POST /auth/reset-password` — consume a reset token and set a new password
(no auth required).
post.description:
Validates the new password, hashes it with bcrypt, and atomically consumes
the token. Returns 400 if the token is invalid or expired.

429.description: Too many password reset attempts from this IP

Retry-After.description: Seconds remaining before another reset attempt is allowed

post.summary: Verify an email address using a one-time verification token.

get.summary: `GET /billing/estimate` — compute an estimated invoice for a given month.
get.description:
**Auth:** JWT (`AuthenticatedTenant`).
Accepts an optional `?month=YYYY-MM` query param (defaults to current month).
Runs the invoice computation pipeline against live usage data without
persisting the result. The response includes line items, subtotal/total,
and whether the plan minimum was applied.

parameters.name: month
parameters.description: Billing month in YYYY-MM format (defaults to current month).

get.summary: `GET /billing/payment-methods` — list saved payment methods from Stripe.
get.description:
**Auth:** JWT (`AuthenticatedTenant`).
Resolves the customer's `stripe_customer_id` and fetches all attached
payment methods from Stripe. Returns 400 if no Stripe customer is linked.

post.summary: Create a Stripe billing portal session for the authenticated customer.

503.description: Stripe not configured
Stripe publishable key unavailable

get.summary: GET /indexes — list all indexes for the authenticated customer

post.summary: Create an index in the requested region for the authenticated customer.

get.summary: `GET /indexes/{name}` — retrieve details and live stats for a single index.
get.description:
**Auth:** JWT (`AuthenticatedTenant`).
Fetches the index summary from the catalog, then resolves the flapjack
target to query live `entries` and `data_size_bytes` from the engine.
If the target is not yet ready (still provisioning), stats default to 0.
Cold indexes still return metadata but stats will be 0.

delete.summary: `DELETE /indexes/{name}` — permanently delete an index and its data.
delete.description:
**Auth:** JWT (`AuthenticatedTenant`).
Requires `confirm: true` in the request body. Enforces write rate limit,
resolves the flapjack target, deletes the index in the engine first, and
only then removes the catalog row — so a backend failure leaves the
catalog intact (fail closed).

get.summary: GET /indexes/:name/analytics/conversions/conversionRate — conversion rate in date range.

503.description: Index is restoring or endpoint not ready

get.summary: GET /indexes/:name/analytics/countries — top country breakdown in date range.

503.description: Index is restoring or endpoint not ready

get.summary: GET /indexes/:name/analytics/devices — top device breakdown in date range.

503.description: Index is restoring or endpoint not ready

get.summary: GET /indexes/:name/analytics/filters — top filter usage in date range.

503.description: Index is restoring or endpoint not ready

get.summary: GET /indexes/:name/analytics/searches — top searches in date range.

503.description: Index is restoring or endpoint not ready
Index is restoring or endpoint not ready
Index is restoring or endpoint not ready
Index is restoring or endpoint not ready

post.summary: `POST /indexes/{name}/batch` — execute a batch of document operations.
post.description:
**Auth:** JWT (`AuthenticatedTenant`).
Rejects cold/restoring indexes (503). Each operation in `requests`
specifies an `action` (e.g. addObject, updateObject, deleteObject)
with an optional `body`. The entire batch is forwarded to flapjack as
a single request; partial failures are reflected in the response array.

503.description: Index is restoring or endpoint not ready

post.summary: `POST /indexes/{name}/browse` — paginated document browsing.
post.description:
**Auth:** JWT (`AuthenticatedTenant`).
Rejects cold/restoring indexes (503). Supports cursor-based pagination,
optional query filtering, and attribute projection. The entire request
is serialized and forwarded to flapjack; the response includes a
cursor for fetching the next page.

503.description: Index is restoring or endpoint not ready

post.summary: `POST /indexes/{name}/chat` — non-streaming chat over an index.
post.description:
**Auth:** JWT (`AuthenticatedTenant`).
Validates the body is a JSON object, rejects streaming requests
(`stream: true` or `Accept: text/event-stream` header). Rejects
cold/restoring indexes (503). Forwards the chat body to flapjack
and returns the response.

503.description: Index is restoring or endpoint not ready
Index is restoring or endpoint not ready
Index is restoring or endpoint not ready
Index is restoring or endpoint not ready

post.summary: POST /indexes/:name/dictionaries/:dictionary_name/batch — batch add/delete entries.

503.description: Index is restoring or endpoint not ready

post.summary: POST /indexes/:name/dictionaries/:dictionary_name/search — search dictionary entries.

503.description: Index is restoring or endpoint not ready

post.summary: `POST /indexes/{name}/events` — submit one query-correlated preview click.
post.description:
The route derives the tenant-scoped engine index and intentionally exposes
no generic event forwarding surface to dashboard callers.

503.description: Index is restoring or endpoint not ready

get.summary: `GET /indexes/{name}/events/debug` — retrieve debug events for an index.
get.description:
**Auth:** JWT (`AuthenticatedTenant`).
Rejects cold/restoring indexes (503). Strips the server-controlled
`index` query parameter, passes remaining query params through to
flapjack's debug events endpoint.

503.description: Index is restoring or endpoint not ready
Index is restoring or endpoint not ready

post.summary: POST /indexes/:name/experiments — create experiment.

503.description: Index is restoring or endpoint not ready
Index is restoring or endpoint not ready
Index is restoring or endpoint not ready
Index is restoring or endpoint not ready

post.summary: POST /indexes/:name/experiments/:id/conclude — conclude experiment.

503.description: Index is restoring or endpoint not ready
Index is restoring or endpoint not ready

post.summary: POST /indexes/:name/experiments/:id/start — start experiment.

503.description: Index is restoring or endpoint not ready

post.summary: POST /indexes/:name/experiments/:id/stop — stop experiment.

503.description: Index is restoring or endpoint not ready
Backend temporarily unavailable

post.summary: `POST /indexes/{name}/keys` — create a scoped flapjack API key for an index.
post.description:
**Auth:** JWT (`AuthenticatedTenant`).
Validates `description` (non-empty, length-capped) and `acl` entries
against `VALID_ACLS`. Rejects cold/restoring indexes, enforces write
rate limit, then delegates to `flapjack_proxy.create_search_key` with
the tenant-scoped UID. The returned key is the only time the full
secret is visible.

503.description: Index is restoring

get.description:
Returns aggregated metrics for a single index, filtered to the
authenticated tenant's flapjack UID. Responses are cached per
`(customer_id, index_name)` with a configurable TTL.

503.description: Backend temporarily unavailable

get.description:
**Auth:** JWT (`AuthenticatedTenant`).
Validates `object_id` path segment, rejects cold/restoring indexes (503),
then fetches the document from flapjack by its tenant-scoped UID.

503.description: Index is restoring or endpoint not ready

delete.description:
**Auth:** JWT (`AuthenticatedTenant`).
Validates `object_id` path segment, rejects cold/restoring indexes (503),
then deletes the document from flapjack by its tenant-scoped UID.

503.description: Index is restoring or endpoint not ready

get.summary: GET /indexes/:name/replicas — list read replicas for an index

post.summary: POST /indexes/:name/replicas — create a read replica in another region
POST /indexes/:name/restore — initiate restore of a cold index

400.description: Index is not in cold storage

404.description: Index not found or no restore job

post.summary: `POST /indexes/{name}/rules/search` — search ranking rules.
post.description:
**Auth:** JWT (`AuthenticatedTenant`).
Rejects cold/restoring indexes (503). Forwards `query`, `page`, and
`hits_per_page` to flapjack's rules search endpoint using the
tenant-scoped UID.

503.description: Index is restoring or endpoint not ready

get.description:
**Auth:** JWT (`AuthenticatedTenant`).
Validates `object_id` path segment, rejects cold/restoring indexes (503),
then fetches the rule from flapjack by its tenant-scoped UID.

503.description: Index is restoring or endpoint not ready

put.description:
**Auth:** JWT (`AuthenticatedTenant`).
Validates `object_id` path segment, rejects cold/restoring indexes (503),
then upserts the rule in flapjack with the provided JSON body.

503.description: Index is restoring or endpoint not ready

delete.description:
**Auth:** JWT (`AuthenticatedTenant`).
Validates `object_id` path segment, rejects cold/restoring indexes (503),
then deletes the rule from flapjack by its tenant-scoped UID.

503.description: Index is restoring or endpoint not ready

post.summary: `POST /indexes/{name}/search` — execute a search query against an index.
post.description:
**Auth:** JWT (`AuthenticatedTenant`).
Validates query length, rejects cold/restoring indexes, enforces the
free-tier monthly search cap and per-index query rate limit before
proxying to flapjack. Extra fields in the request body (`page`,
`hitsPerPage`, `facets`, etc.) are forwarded as-is; the validated
`query` key is inserted last so it cannot be overridden via `extra`.
Records an access timestamp for cold-tier inactivity tracking.

503.description: Index is restoring
Index is restoring or endpoint not ready

post.summary: POST /indexes/:name/security/sources

503.description: Index is restoring or endpoint not ready
Index is restoring or endpoint not ready

get.description:
**Auth:** JWT (`AuthenticatedTenant`).
Uses `IndexNotReadyBehavior::BadRequest` (returns 400 instead of 503
when the index is not yet placed). Fetches the full settings object
from flapjack.

503.description: Index is restoring

put.description:
**Auth:** JWT (`AuthenticatedTenant`).
Validates that the body is a JSON object (rejects arrays, strings, etc.),
rejects cold/restoring indexes (503), then forwards the settings
object to flapjack.

503.description: Index is restoring or endpoint not ready

get.description:
**Auth:** JWT (`AuthenticatedTenant`).
Rejects cold/restoring indexes (503). Returns the current query
suggestions configuration from flapjack.

503.description: Index is restoring or endpoint not ready

put.summary: `PUT /indexes/{name}/suggestions` — create or update query suggestions config.
put.description:
**Auth:** JWT (`AuthenticatedTenant`).
Rejects cold/restoring indexes (503). Upserts the query suggestions
configuration in flapjack with the provided JSON body.

503.description: Index is restoring or endpoint not ready

delete.description:
**Auth:** JWT (`AuthenticatedTenant`).
Rejects cold/restoring indexes (503). Removes the query suggestions
configuration from flapjack for this index.

503.description: Index is restoring or endpoint not ready

get.description:
**Auth:** JWT (`AuthenticatedTenant`).
Rejects cold/restoring indexes (503). Returns the current build status
of the query suggestions model from flapjack.

503.description: Index is restoring or endpoint not ready

post.summary: `POST /indexes/{name}/synonyms/search` — search synonym entries.
post.description:
**Auth:** JWT (`AuthenticatedTenant`).
Rejects cold/restoring indexes (503). Forwards `query`, optional
`synonym_type` filter, `page`, and `hits_per_page` to flapjack's
synonyms search endpoint using the tenant-scoped UID.

503.description: Index is restoring or endpoint not ready

get.description:
**Auth:** JWT (`AuthenticatedTenant`).
Validates `object_id` path segment, rejects cold/restoring indexes (503),
then fetches the synonym from flapjack by its tenant-scoped UID.

503.description: Index is restoring or endpoint not ready

put.description:
**Auth:** JWT (`AuthenticatedTenant`).
Validates `object_id` path segment, rejects cold/restoring indexes (503),
then upserts the synonym in flapjack with the provided JSON body.

503.description: Index is restoring or endpoint not ready

delete.description:
**Auth:** JWT (`AuthenticatedTenant`).
Validates `object_id` path segment, rejects cold/restoring indexes (503),
then deletes the synonym from flapjack by its tenant-scoped UID.

503.description: Index is restoring or endpoint not ready

get.summary: GET /invoices — list all invoices for the authenticated tenant.
GET /invoices/:invoice_id — get invoice details with line items.

200.description: One page of Algolia source-index picker metadata

400.description: Invalid Algolia credentials, application ID, cursor, or bounded catalog

503.description: Algolia discovery unavailable or timed out

post.summary: `POST /onboarding/credentials` — generate a search-only API key via flapjack.
post.description:
**Auth:** JWT (`AuthenticatedTenant`).
Requires at least one running deployment and one index. Creates a
flapjack search key scoped to the customer's indexes (ACLs: search,
browse). Resolves the correct proxy node ID for shared-VM deployments.
Returns 400 if no deployment or indexes exist yet.

400.description: No active endpoint or indexes available

503.description: Flapjack temporarily unavailable

get.summary: GET /onboarding/status — returns onboarding state derived from existing data

503.description: Billing service unavailable

post.summary:
POST /pricing/compare — compare pricing across providers for a workload profile.
Public endpoint (no authentication required).

503.description: Repository unavailable

get.summary: GET /usage — monthly usage summary for the authenticated tenant.

parameters.name: month
parameters.description: Billing month in YYYY-MM format (defaults to current month).

get.summary: GET /usage/daily — daily usage entries for the authenticated tenant.

parameters.name: month
parameters.description: Billing month in YYYY-MM format (defaults to current month).

profile.description:
Export intentionally includes only the customer-safe profile row and
excludes password hash, Stripe/customer billing internals, API keys,
verification/reset tokens, status, updated_at, quota-warning, and
object-storage carry-forward fields.

lastBuildTimeS.description: Duration in seconds of Algolia's most recent index build.

primary.description: Primary index name, when this index is a replica.

replicas.description: Replica index names configured for this primary index.

updatedAt.description: Last updated timestamp reported by Algolia.

CustomerIndexReplicaSummary.description:
Customer-facing view — omits internal VM details while exposing the
stable endpoint clients can use for this replica.

ErrorResponse.description:
Shared error envelope returned by all API error responses.
Shape: `{"error": "<message>"}`.

InvoiceDetailResponse.description:
Full invoice detail returned by `GET /invoices/{invoice_id}`, including
Stripe links (hosted URL, PDF), line items, and finalization/payment
timestamps. Fields like `stripe_invoice_id` and `hosted_invoice_url` are
`None` until the invoice is finalized and synced with Stripe.

MigrationErrorResponse.description: Shared coded error envelope for migration-family responses.

code.description: Stable migration error code for programmatic clients.

allOf.description:
Additional search parameters (page, hitsPerPage, facets, etc.)
forwarded to flapjack as-is.

SearchRequest.description:
Search query with extensible parameters. Additional fields beyond `query`
(e.g. page, hitsPerPage, facets) are forwarded to the search engine via serde flatten.
